# Roadmap <id>: <title>

## Motivation

Why this roadmap node exists.

## Goal

What must be true when this roadmap node is complete.

## Non-Goals

What this roadmap node explicitly will not do.

## Dependency Position

```text
previous roadmap node
  -> this roadmap node
    -> next roadmap node
```

## Child Issue Topology

```text
1. <child issue title>
2. <child issue title>
3. <child issue title>
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Child issues are complete and merged into the roadmap branch.
- [ ] Roadmap PR validation passes.
- [ ] Examples are updated or explicitly deemed unnecessary.
- [ ] Security review is complete.
- [ ] Data safety review is complete, if relevant.
- [ ] Operational reliability checkpoint is complete.
- [ ] Handoff to the next roadmap node is posted.

## Security

- New surfaces:
- Auth/authz:
- Secrets/redaction:
- Network exposure:
- Mutation/destructive behavior:
- Tests:
- Residual risk:

## Operational Reliability

- Health/status:
- Logs/events:
- Failure modes:
- Cleanup:
- Retry/resume:
- Examples added or updated:
- Examples still missing:

## Handoff

What the next roadmap node should know.
